title: chrysoma arborescens
intro: Chrysoma arborescens, also known as Mexican daisy or Chrysanthemum daisy, is a flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Chrysoma arborescens include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting digestion. Chrysoma arborescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
